description: Assumption registry — every assumption documented with confidence level, risk exposure, and validation status
purpose: Track every assumption made during discovery with confidence scores and validation history to reduce false premises

schema.category: enum - technical | organizational | market | resource | timeline | stakeholder
schema.risk_if_wrong: string - what happens if this assumption is violated
schema.validation_method: string - how to verify this assumption
schema.validation_status: enum - UNVALIDATED | VALIDATING | VALIDATED | VIOLATED | RETIRED
schema.violation_evidence: string - FK → L33/evidence (null if not violated)
schema.mitigation_strategy: string - what to do if violated
schema.source: enum - discovery | interview | data_analysis | expert_judgment | historical

notes: Every assumption has a confidence score and validation status. L126 tracks immutable history of confidence changes.
